arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Ruben Amorim makes instant decision as Patrick Dorgu assessment given
arts.sum: Harry Maguire's late winner helped Manchester United beat Leicester City in the FA Cup on Friday and Ruben Amorim's side will now enjoy a few days off before their next game

arts.ttl: Italiano: “I Want Bologna to Keep Dreaming. Dominguez is a Surprise. Castro? He Can Become a Top Player”
arts.sum: Bologna manager Vincenzo Italiano recently shared his thoughts on the team's performance, their Champions League experience, and highlighted some standout players in an interview with Sport Mediaset. The post Italiano: “I Want Bologna to Keep Dreaming. Dominguez is a Surprise. Castro? He Can Become a Top Player” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Lecce’s Giampaolo: “I Have Many Doubts, New Players Have Brought Enthusiasm”
arts.sum: Lecce manager Marco Giampaolo addressed the media ahead of his team's upcoming Serie A match against Bologna, discussing the squad's condition, tactical considerations, and the impact of new arrivals. The post Lecce’s Giampaolo: “I Have Many Doubts, New Players Have Brought Enthusiasm” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim defends Patrick Dorgu decision after scathing Roy Keane review
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim defended his decision to play the club's new left-footed defender Patrick Dorgu at right wing-back, a tactical call which received a typically blunt appraisal from former Red Devils skipper Roy Keane. "They've brought new players in, you're thinking he's [Dorgu] going to play in his position and he's playing right wing-back.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Lecce v Bologna: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A season enters its 24th round, Lecce welcome in-form Bologna to the Stadio Comunale Via del Mare on Sunday. This match presents an intriguing contrast between a team fighting to stay clear of relegation and another pushing for European qualification. The post Serie A | Lecce v Bologna: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes makes feelings clear as Patrick Dorgu's Man Utd debut lasts just 45 minutes
arts.sum: Manchester United icon Paul Scholes did not seem to be a huge advocate for Ruben Amorim deciding to play new signing Patrick Dorgu as an inverted right wing-back on his debut

arts.ttl: Roy Keane lets rip over new Man Utd signing Patrick Dorgu - 'Is this what it's come to?'
arts.sum: Roy Keane was once again left unconvinced by Manchester United as they battled past Leicester in the FA Cup thanks to Harry Maguire's winner in stoppage time

arts.ttl: Ex-Lecce talent Dorgu impressive on Manchester United debut
arts.sum: Former Lecce wing-back Patrick Dorgu made his Manchester United debut in the FA Cup this...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals Patrick Dorgu plan after £29.4m signing is handed his Man United debut against Leicester in the FA Cup fourth round - but wing back is taken off at half-time
arts.sum: Dorgu came straight into the Manchester United starting line-up for their FA Cup fourth round tie against Leicester, after completing his £29.4million move from Lecce last week.

arts.ttl: Team News: Patrick Dorgu, Ayden Heaven decisions made as Man United confirm XI for Leicester battle in FA Cup
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his starting XI for Friday night's FA Cup fourth-round contest with Leicester City at Old Trafford.
